goals.objective: Implement canonical OKF runtime resolution and health reporting.
acceptance_criteria: OKF_BASE absent resolves repo knowledge symlink.
packages/knowledge is not treated as production canonical knowledge.
GET /api/swarms/knowledge/runtime reports validation, counts and drift.

goals.objective: Sync OKF skills, agents and services into swarm_capabilities.
acceptance_criteria: Dry-run reports create/update/block counts with zero writes.
Incomplete contracts remain candidate with blocked reasons.

goals.objective: Close completed loop runs into eval, reflection, memory candidate and follow-up work.
acceptance_criteria: Improvement creates skill improvement work item.

goals.objective: Allow validated OKF-backed specialist profiles and skills to influence panels and routing.
acceptance_criteria: OKF profile overrides fallback only when valid.
High-risk security reviewer gate remains enforced.

goals.objective: Expose Knowledge Runtime state in Mission Control.
acceptance_criteria: Dashboard shows canonical OKF root, validation status and sync drift.
Dashboard does not present packages/knowledge as canonical runtime knowledge.
Next safe actions reflect OKF health and learning closure state.

goals.objective: Run deterministic smoke from OKF validation to learning closure.
